title: Attack of the Clones not talking about Rei
display_title: Attack of the Clones not talking about Rei
wikitext: []: Attack of the Clones (not talking about Rei)             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Sep 13, 2015 10:04 pm It has been said that imitation is the sincerest form of flattery. As many of us know, with the success of NGE, there have been many imitators hoping to cash in on the wave. So I have been wondering, have any of these clones been considered good in their own right? Which ones are considered to really suck? (I know that there is a thread that talked about whether one anime, Rahxephon, counts as an Eva clone or not. I'm just too lazy to look it up right now.) If any of the mods feel that this should be in the anime subforum, please feel free to move it there.
